title: PEER SUPPORT - 211info
text: SOARING HEIGHTS RECOVERY HOMES PEER SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support services. Eligibility: Individuals who self-identify as having a substance use disorder Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
